# Bangladesh Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-05-19. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-Division Data Files

- [Barishal](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/barishal-bd10.txt) — 6 districts, 42 upazilas
- [Chattogram](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chattogram-bd20.txt) — 11 districts, 104 upazilas
- [Dhaka](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/dhaka-bd30.txt) — 13 districts, 89 upazilas
- [Khulna](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/khulna-bd40.txt) — 10 districts, 59 upazilas
- [Mymensingh](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/mymensingh-bd45.txt) — 4 districts, 35 upazilas
- [Rajshahi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/rajshahi-bd50.txt) — 8 districts, 67 upazilas
- [Rangpur](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/rangpur-bd55.txt) — 8 districts, 58 upazilas
- [Sylhet](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sylhet-bd60.txt) — 4 districts, 41 upazilas

## Summary

| Division | Districts | Upazilas | 
|---|---|---|
| Barishal | 6 | 42 | 
| Chattogram | 11 | 104 | 
| Dhaka | 13 | 89 | 
| Khulna | 10 | 59 | 
| Mymensingh | 4 | 35 | 
| Rajshahi | 8 | 67 | 
| Rangpur | 8 | 58 | 
| Sylhet | 4 | 41 |
